title: ficus tenuicuspidata var. major
intro: Ficus tenuicuspidata var. major, also known as the 'Large-leafed Ficus', is a variety of the Ficus tenuicuspidata species, a type of fig tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds. The health benefits of Ficus tenuicuspidata var. major include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems, making it a valuable herbal remedy in traditional Chinese medicine. Herbal preparations of Ficus tenuicuspidata var. major are often made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
